bead.title: [visual-suite] V10 author + generate user-workflow capstone
bead.description: Per plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-visual-suite.md. The coup de grace. Iterative diagram showing how a user works with DDx over time: author/refine artifact -> graph synthesizes context -> bead created -> agent runs (ddx try / ddx work) -> evidence captured -> human re-aligns -> loop closes. Explanatory register; load-bearing artifact. Lives at docs/helix/01-frame/visuals/user-workflow.{prompt.md,png,png.ddx.yaml}. HARD BLOCKED on artifact infrastructure (same as V6/V9). Depends on V6 and V9 outcomes (visual style established).
